name: Oatmeal Scrapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pork and bone in a large pot and cover with water. Cook until the meat is tender.
2. Remove the bone and meat, then chop the meat using a food chopper.
3. Return the chopped meat to the liquid. Bring to a boil and stir in oatmeal, seasonings, and onion juice.
4. Cook slowly for 1 hour.
5. Pour into oblong pans and allow to cool.
6. When cooled, slice and fry until crisp and brown.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
